action.reasoning: Observation: Real codec-aug 3-epoch model gave test EER 0.3011, much WORSE than 0.0956 baseline. Analysis: The codec aug at training time uses ffmpeg subprocess with random codecs at 0.75 prob — this likely produced corrupted/silent audio for many samples (subprocess failures, decoder errors, length mismatches), poisoning training. The earlier simulated codec aug (iter 5/6) worked better. Best checkpoint is still iter 6 (0.0956) but it got overwritten. Decision: Revert to the simulated codec augmentation that worked (iter 5/6), retrain 3 epochs with stable pipeline. No real ffmpeg aug. Also use best.pt selection by dev EER.
